publishedAbstract: Mismatch in templates: # oc describe template glusterfs..... Name: CLUSTER_NAME Display Name: GlusterFS cluster name Description: A unique name to identify which heketi service manages this cluster, useful for running multiple heketi instances Required: false Value: storage ================================== # oc describe template heketi..... Name: CLUSTER_NAME Display Name: GlusterFS cluster name Description: A unique name to identify this heketi service, useful for running multiple heketi instances Required: false Value: glusterfs =================================== # oc describe template glusterblock-provisioner..... Name: CLUSTER_NAME Display Name: GlusterFS cluster name Description: A unique name to identify which heketi service manages this cluster, useful for running multiple heketi instances Required: false Value: storage =-=-=-=-=-=-=-= All IMAGE_NAMEs are empty: Name: IMAGE_NAME..... Required: true Value: =-=-=-=-=-=-=-= The daemonset node selector is not correct: # oc describe ds glusterfs-storage Name: glusterfs-storage Selector: glusterfs=storage-pod Node-Selector: node-role.kubernetes.io/storage=true
publishedTitle: Glusterfs and heketi and gluster-block-storage pods are not working on a node
